title: Housing Search Assistance * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Housing Search Assistance * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Domestic Violence Issues Former Foster Children Foster Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Families Homeless Youth Homelessness Issues Teen Pregnancy Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MID ROGUE FOUNDATION MOBILE NAVIGATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outreach assistance with housing and job search help, identification assistance (ID and Social Security cards), replacement birth certificate help with application and fee, general mail delivery, credit report requests, and SNAP and OHP application assistance. Also helps to connect people to services for savings, spending, educational plans, and life skills. Mobile Navigators meet clients in public spaces that work best for the client. PO Box 1972 Grants Pass, OR 97528 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 295-5706 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID ROGUE FOUNDATION MOBILE NAVIGATION PROGRAM
